son ; on the sides, grief; on the chest, attainment of desired objects;

Pimples appearing on the back lead to the destruction of all
miseries ; on the arms, to the annihilation of all enemies ; those on
the wrists, to restraint or arrest ; and those near the arms, to the
acquisition of ornaments and the like.
